overview: We'll design and manage a results-driven social media presence for Grochow Law — building trust with employees navigating workplace challenges, growing a consistent audience, and positioning the firm as the go-to employment law advocate in the region.
objectives: Increase inbound inquiries through forms, calls, and booked consultations
Improve clarity around the firm's practice areas
Strengthen credibility with educational content and case highlights
Build a consistent brand voice across Instagram and LinkedIn
deliverables: 12 social media posts per month (Instagram + LinkedIn)
Monthly strategy call and content calendar
nextSteps: Submit deposit to schedule kickoff call
